name: notion
description: Notion integration — search, read, and update pages and databases via the official Notion MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Search, read & update Notion, with official skills
interface.longDescription: Connect the official Notion MCP to search, read, and update your Notion pages and databases from UniAI — capture notes, update trackers, and pull docs into context. Bundled with Notion's official skills for meeting notes, research docs, knowledge capture, and spec-to-implementation.
